OLD_AMBER.name: OLD_AMBER
OLD_AMBER.description: The holder gains the FOSSIL type

DAWN_STONE.name: DAWN_STONE
DAWN_STONE.description: The holder gains the PSYCHIC type

WATER_STONE.name: WATER_STONE
WATER_STONE.description: The holder gains the WATER type

THUNDER_STONE.name: THUNDER_STONE
THUNDER_STONE.description: The holder gains the ELECTRIC type

FIRE_STONE.name: FIRE_STONE
FIRE_STONE.description: The holder gains the FIRE type

MOON_STONE.name: MOON_STONE
MOON_STONE.description: The holder gains the FAIRY type

DUSK_STONE.name: DUSK_STONE
DUSK_STONE.description: The holder gains the DARK type

LEAF_STONE.name: LEAF_STONE
LEAF_STONE.description: The holder gains the GRASS type

ICE_STONE.name: ICE_STONE
ICE_STONE.description: The holder gains the ICE type

SOUL_DEW.name: SOUL_DEW
SOUL_DEW.description: During combat, the holder gains 5 AP and 5 PP every second

REAPER_CLOTH.name: REAPER_CLOTH
REAPER_CLOTH.description: The holder's ability can now critically strike based on CRIT_CHANCE. If the ability can already critically strike by default, increase CRIT_POWER by 50% instead.

POKEMONOMICON.name: POKEMONOMICON
POKEMONOMICON.description: When the holder deals SPECIAL, they BURN the target for 3 seconds and reduce its SPE_DEF by 1.

POWER_LENS.name: POWER_LENS
POWER_LENS.description: The amount of SPECIAL blocked by SPE_DEF is inflicted back to the attacker

SHELL_BELL.name: SHELL_BELL
SHELL_BELL.description: Holder heals for 33% of all damages inflicted

HEAVY_DUTY_BOOTS.name: HEAVY_DUTY_BOOTS
HEAVY_DUTY_BOOTS.description: Holder is immune to any BOARD_EFFECT, forced displacement and LOCKED

AQUA_EGG.name: AQUA_EGG
AQUA_EGG.description: The holder regains 20% of its max PP after casting its ability, + 2 PP for each cast done in the fight

BLUE_ORB.name: BLUE_ORB
BLUE_ORB.description: Every 3 attacks, unleashes a chain lightning that bounces to the 2 closest enemies, dealing 10 SPECIAL and burning 15 PP

SCOPE_LENS.name: SCOPE_LENS
SCOPE_LENS.description: Critical attacks steal 10 PP from the target.

STAR_DUST.name: STAR_DUST
STAR_DUST.description: After casting ability, gain 50% of max PP as SHIELD

GREEN_ORB.name: GREEN_ORB
GREEN_ORB.description: Holder and ADJACENT allies regain 5% of their max HP every 2 seconds. 30% of overheal is converted to PP.

DEEP_SEA_TOOTH.name: DEEP_SEA_TOOTH
DEEP_SEA_TOOTH.description: The holder attacks restore 5 additional PP. If the attack knocks out the target, restore 15 additional PP.

SMOKE_BALL.name: SMOKE_BALL
SMOKE_BALL.description: Once below 40% max HP, drop the smoke ball, gain 70 SHIELD and jump to a tile away. Every ADJACENT enemy is PARALYSIS and BLINDED for 4 seconds.

XRAY_VISION.name: XRAY_VISION
XRAY_VISION.description: Holder is immune to SLEEP and their attacks can no longer miss.

RAZOR_FANG.name: RAZOR_FANG
RAZOR_FANG.description: +100% CRIT_POWER. Critical attacks apply ARMOR_BREAK for 2 seconds.

LOADED_DICE.name: LOADED_DICE
LOADED_DICE.description: Attacks have [50,LK]% chance to also hit the lowest health enemy ADJACENT to target for 75% of the damage, which also trigger on-hit effects.

PUNCHING_GLOVE.name: PUNCHING_GLOVE
PUNCHING_GLOVE.description: Attacks deal 8 % of target max HP as additional PHYSICAL on hit

MUSCLE_BAND.name: MUSCLE_BAND
MUSCLE_BAND.description: When the holder takes damage, gain 1 stack. Every 2 stacks, the holder gains +2 DEF, +1 ATK and +5 SPEED (max 20 stacks)

STICKY_BARB.name: STICKY_BARB
STICKY_BARB.description: When struck by an attack at melee range, deal 3 + 15% of DEF as retaliation TRUE and inflict WOUND for 3 seconds to the attacker.

ABILITY_SHIELD.name: ABILITY_SHIELD
ABILITY_SHIELD.description: When combat begins, the holder and allies ADJACENT_IN_THE_SAME_ROW receive 20% of their max HP as SHIELD and RUNE_PROTECT for 5 seconds

SAFETY_GOGGLES.name: SAFETY_GOGGLES
SAFETY_GOGGLES.description: Holder is immune to all negative status effects and to sandstorm damage

KINGS_ROCK.name: KINGS_ROCK
KINGS_ROCK.description: +100 HP. 20% of max HP are gained as SHIELD when combat begins.

SHINY_CHARM.name: SHINY_CHARM
SHINY_CHARM.description: Prevents damage and give PROTECT for 1.5 seconds and 50 PP the first time the holder gets below 30% HP

PROTECTIVE_PADS.name: PROTECTIVE_PADS
PROTECTIVE_PADS.description: Holder deals double damage against units with  SHIELD, and is protected from recoil damage and retaliation effects.

ASSAULT_VEST.name: ASSAULT_VEST
ASSAULT_VEST.description: +40 SPE_DEF. Reduce BURN and POISONNED damage by 50%

AMULET_COIN.name: AMULET_COIN
AMULET_COIN.description:
+1 GOLD each time the holder knocks out an opponent.
Reduce max interest cap by 10 GOLD.

POKE_DOLL.name: POKE_DOLL
POKE_DOLL.description: Reduce all incoming PHYSICAL and SPECIAL by 30%. Makes the holder more likely to be targeted.

RED_ORB.name: RED_ORB
RED_ORB.description: 25% of attack damage is dealt as TRUE

FLAME_ORB.name: FLAME_ORB
FLAME_ORB.description: Holder increases its base ATK by 100% and is immune to FREEZE, but suffers from BURN during the entire fight.

ROCKY_HELMET.name: ROCKY_HELMET
ROCKY_HELMET.description: +25 DEF. Negates critical bonus damage from all incoming critical hits.

MAGMARIZER.name: MAGMARIZER
MAGMARIZER.description: Gives FIRE synergy. The holder doesn't take BURN damage. Instead, it gains 30 SPEED when burning.

DRAGON_SCALE.name: DRAGON_SCALE
DRAGON_SCALE.description: Gives DRAGON synergy as first synergy.

METRONOME.name: METRONOME
METRONOME.description: Gives SOUND synergy. Every second, the holder gains 5 PP.

AIR_BALLOON.name: AIR_BALLOON
AIR_BALLOON.description: Gives FLYING synergy. Gain 10% chance to dodge attacks and immunity to any BOARD_EFFECT.

EXPLORER_KIT.name: EXPLORER_KIT
EXPLORER_KIT.description: Gives GROUND synergy. Increase the [LK] chance to find gold buried in the ground.

BERSERK_GENE.name: BERSERK_GENE
BERSERK_GENE.description: Gives MONSTER synergy. The holder gets CONFUSION for 3 seconds if gaining MONSTER stacks.

ELECTIRIZER.name: ELECTIRIZER
ELECTIRIZER.description: Gives ELECTRIC synergy. Every third attack inflicts PARALYSIS for 2 seconds.

TERRAIN_EXTENDER.name: TERRAIN_EXTENDER
TERRAIN_EXTENDER.description: At the start of the fight, holder gains either ELECTRIC_FIELD, GRASS_FIELD, PSYCHIC_FIELD or FAIRY_FIELD based on its synergies. When casting its ability, spread the field effect to all allies sharing the field's synergy.

INCENSE.name: INCENSE
INCENSE.description: Gives FLORA synergy. Each Pokémon in shop has an additional 5% chance to share a common synergy with the holder.

COOKING_POT.name: COOKING_POT
COOKING_POT.description: Gives GOURMET synergy. When BURN, the COOKING_POT is heated little by little which gives 10 SPEED per second.

RUNNING_SHOES.name: RUNNING_SHOES
RUNNING_SHOES.description: Gives FIELD synergy. The holder gains 5 SPEED every tile they move (jumps and dashes count for one tile).

EVIOLITE.name: EVIOLITE
EVIOLITE.description: Holder gets a bunch of stats, but can no longer evolve. Can only be given to non-fully evolved Pokémon.

GOLD_BOTTLE_CAP.name: GOLD_BOTTLE_CAP
GOLD_BOTTLE_CAP.description: +1% CRIT_POWER per GOLD you have. Gain 1 GOLD per KO. If eliminating the last enemy, get a Jackpot that doubles the amount gained during the round.

COMET_SHARD.name: COMET_SHARD
COMET_SHARD.description: Starts the round by diving like a comet on an enemy at the opposite side of the board, dealing 300% ATK as SPECIAL to target and 100% ATK as SPECIAL to ADJACENT enemies, while gaining PROTECT for 2 seconds.

SHINY_STONE.name: SHINY_STONE
SHINY_STONE.description: Gives LIGHT synergy. A second spotlight is projected onto the holder's tile at the start of the fight.

ABSORB_BULB.name: ABSORB_BULB
ABSORB_BULB.description: All the damage reduction is absorbed by the bulb. Once under 50% HP, bulb explodes, dealing all damage absorbed to ADJACENT enemy units as SPECIAL.

GOLD_BOW.name: GOLD_BOW
GOLD_BOW.description: The holder does not count for team size limit.

TEAL_MASK.name: TEAL_MASK
TEAL_MASK.description: This carved wooden mask is adorned with crystals, grants Ogerpon the FLORA type during battle. Ogerpon loses its mask when its shield is depleted.

WELLSPRING_MASK.name: WELLSPRING_MASK
WELLSPRING_MASK.description: This carved wooden mask is adorned with crystals, grants Ogerpon the AQUATIC type during battle. Ogerpon loses its mask when its shield is depleted.

CORNERSTONE_MASK.name: CORNERSTONE_MASK
CORNERSTONE_MASK.description: This carved wooden mask is adorned with crystals, grants Ogerpon the ROCK type during battle. Ogerpon loses its mask when its shield is depleted.

HEARTHFLAME_MASK.name: HEARTHFLAME_MASK
HEARTHFLAME_MASK.description: This carved wooden mask is adorned with crystals, grants Ogerpon the FIRE type during battle. Ogerpon loses its mask when its shield is depleted.

SILK_SCARF.name: SILK_SCARF
SILK_SCARF.description: Combine it with other item components to make all kinds of scarves, bands and bows. Those items will be removed if you lower down NORMAL synergy level.

FRIEND_BOW.name: FRIEND_BOW
FRIEND_BOW.description: The holder gains the NORMAL type.

BLACK_BELT.name: BLACK_BELT
BLACK_BELT.description: Critical attacks provide 33% of the damage dealt as SHIELD.

NULLIFY_BANDANNA.name: NULLIFY_BANDANNA
NULLIFY_BANDANNA.description: Holder can no longer cast its ability. AP is converted to SHIELD, and PP are converted to bonus SPECIAL on next attack.

LUCKY_RIBBON.name: LUCKY_RIBBON
LUCKY_RIBBON.description: Holder has 30% more LUCK and has [15,LK]% chance to dodge attacks.

EXPLOSIVE_BAND.name: EXPLOSIVE_BAND
EXPLOSIVE_BAND.description: The first time user shield is depleted, this item explodes, dealing 50% of all SHIELD gained so far as SPECIAL to ADJACENT enemies.

TWIST_BAND.name: TWIST_BAND
TWIST_BAND.description: Stat debuffs inflicted by enemies become buffs instead. Holder stat buffs cannot be stolen.

BIG_EATER_BELT.name: BIG_EATER_BELT
BIG_EATER_BELT.description: Increase all stat buffs received by 25% (rounded down, not affecting PP). Allows the wearer to eat 2 different dishes per round.

COVER_BAND.name: COVER_BAND
COVER_BAND.description: If an ADJACENT ally is about to get KO with some incoming damage, the wearer takes the damage instead.

EFFICIENT_BANDANNA.name: EFFICIENT_BANDANNA
EFFICIENT_BANDANNA.description: The holder and allies ADJACENT_IN_THE_SAME_ROW have their max PP reduced by 15%.

GRACIDEA_FLOWER.name: GRACIDEA_FLOWER
GRACIDEA_FLOWER.description: When combat begins, the holder and allies ADJACENT_IN_THE_SAME_ROW gain +20 SPEED

WONDER_BOX.name: WONDER_BOX
WONDER_BOX.description: At the beginning of each battle, WONDER_BOX is replaced by 2 temporary random craftable items (max 3 items held)

MAX_REVIVE.name: MAX_REVIVE
MAX_REVIVE.description: Give RESURRECTION, preventing the holder first KO and restoring to max HP

CHEF_HAT.name: CHEF_HAT
CHEF_HAT.description: The holder will cook their Signature Dish between rounds.

SPELL_TAG.name: SPELL_TAG
SPELL_TAG.description: Gives GHOST synergy. When the holder is KO, CURSE its attacker to be KO'd after 10 seconds

EXP_SHARE.name: EXP_SHARE
EXP_SHARE.description: Get the best ATK, AP, DEF and SPE_DEF values of allies ADJACENT_IN_THE_SAME_ROW.

DYNAMAX_BAND.name: DYNAMAX_BAND
DYNAMAX_BAND.description: At the start of the fight, raise max HP by 200%.

POKERUS_VIAL.name: POKERUS_VIAL
POKERUS_VIAL.description: Gives POISON synergy. Infects the holder with POKERUS, gaining 1 ATK and 10 AP every 3 seconds and transmitting to ADJACENT allies.

SACRED_ASH.name: SACRED_ASH
SACRED_ASH.description: Gives RESURRECTION. After resurrecting, up to 3 allies KO are resurrected as well, but without items.

RUSTED_SWORD.name: RUSTED_SWORD
RUSTED_SWORD.description: It is said that a hero used this sword to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. Gives the holder +50% base ATK. Transfers to the ally with the weakest ATK when the holder faints.

SURFBOARD.name: SURFBOARD
SURFBOARD.description: Gives AQUATIC synergy. The holder casts [ref] at every tidal wave, with the ability level matching current AQUATIC synergy level.

WHITE_FLUTE.name: WHITE_FLUTE
WHITE_FLUTE.description: Spawn 3 WILD Pokémon around the holder at the start of the fight. Rarity and tier increase with stage level.

RARE_CANDY.name: RARE_CANDY
RARE_CANDY.description: Immediately make a Pokémon evolve. Can only be given to Pokémon that can evolve, and reduce its sell price to its previous tier.

MAX_ELIXIR.name: MAX_ELIXIR
MAX_ELIXIR.description: Restores 100% of max PP 1 second after the first ability cast.

TINY_MUSHROOM.name: TINY_MUSHROOM
TINY_MUSHROOM.description: Gives 30 SPEED and reduce max HP by 30% for the next fight when consumed. Will be sold for 1 GOLD when returning to town.

SALAC_BERRY.name: SALAC_BERRY
SALAC_BERRY.description: Consumed once below 50% HP, heal 50 HP and gain 50 SPEED

GANLON_BERRY.name: GANLON_BERRY
GANLON_BERRY.description: Consumed once below 50% HP, heal 50 HP and gain 20 DEF

APICOT_BERRY.name: APICOT_BERRY
APICOT_BERRY.description: Consumed once below 50% HP, heal 50 HP and gain 20 SPE_DEF

LEPPA_BERRY.name: LEPPA_BERRY
LEPPA_BERRY.description: Consumed once below 50% HP or after casting ability, heal 50 HP and gain 50 PP

LUM_BERRY.name: LUM_BERRY
LUM_BERRY.description: Consumed once below 50% HP, heal 50 HP, clear negative status and get RUNE_PROTECT for 5 seconds
